session.user:
Run the following command and report results: uv run pytest tests/tui/screens/test_objective_nodes_screen.py tests/tui/screens/test_launch_screen.py -x -v
Report all test results including pass/fail counts and any error messages.
session.assistant: I'll run the pytest command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on objective nodes and launch screen tests

session.tool_result:
